themes.reasoning_notes: Repeated attack-trigger detain locks down up to two permanents each turn while a flying 4/5 serves as a control top-end threat.
Detain creates temporary time-walk style pressure by shutting off blockers, attackers, and activated abilities through the next turn.
A 7-mana flying threat that repeatedly detains up to two nonland permanents on attack, fitting control top-end more than a dedicated engine.
Detain produces temporary board suppression and can force through attacks, but on a 7-drop it is a secondary tempo element rather than the main deckbuilding theme.
